name: vacas-engine
description: Vacas-Engine - Orquestrador do Ecossistema Treis & Verona

scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/treis && npm run lint -w packages/verona-sdk
scripts.prepare:sdk: node apps/treis/scripts/prepare-sdk.mjs && git subtree push --prefix packages/vacas-engine-sdk sdk-public main
scripts.publish:sdk: git subtree push --prefix packages/vacas-engine-sdk sdk-public main
